tasks.label: Stop Flask Server
args: $project='COURS\L3\POO\EXAMEN'; $procs=Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name = 'python.exe'" | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -like '*run.py*' -and $_.CommandLine -like "*$project*" }; foreach($p in $procs){ Stop-Process -Id $p.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if(Test-Path '.run.lock'){ Remove-Item '.run.lock' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host 'Flask server stopped (if running).'
